HomePage.headline: Your organization's workspace, all in one place.
HomePage.staffToolsDesc: Intake, appointments, service logs, and dashboards in one place.
HomePage.brandedDesc: Your organization's name, logo, and colors throughout the portal.
HomePage.roleAccessDesc: Admins, staff, and clients each see only what they need.
HomePage.onboardingDesc: Admins set up the workspace in minutes with a guided setup flow.
HomePage.dashboardDesc: Clients, appointments, activity, and reports — all from one screen.
HomePage.secureDesc: Sign in with Google or a password. Only approved users can access the portal.
HomePage.privateDesc: Your data stays separate — no shared portals with other organizations.

LoginPage.staffDesc: Use the same workspace for intake, appointments, reporting, semantic note search, and operational controls.
LoginPage.clientsDesc: Invite-only portal access stays read-only and keeps internal notes hidden while surfacing upcoming appointments and recent activity.
LoginPage.needAccess: Need access? Ask your organization admin to add your email and assign your role before you sign in.
LoginPage.errorNotApproved: That email is not approved for workspace access yet. Ask your organization admin to add it first.
LoginPage.errorOauth: Google sign-in could not complete. Try again or use the password fallback if your organization supports it.
LoginPage.errorPortalMissing: Your client portal access is not fully configured yet. Contact your organization for help.

PasswordLoginPage.label: Password fallback
PasswordLoginPage.headline: Use password access only when Google is not available for this organization.
PasswordLoginPage.errorNotApproved: That email is not approved for workspace access yet. Ask your organization admin to add it first.

LoginForm.title: Sign in to {orgName}
LoginForm.description: Google is the primary sign-in path. Use the fallback screen only if your organization approved password access for the same email.
LoginForm.footerNote: This portal is configured by the organization and can be branded without changing the underlying platform.

PasswordLoginForm.title: Password login
PasswordLoginForm.description: This is the fallback path for approved emails that do not use Google OAuth.

AdminDashboard.description: Configure what matters, review activity, and open the next filtered view from any widget.
AdminDashboard.setupCompleteHint: Role defaults and personal overrides are active. Every chart and KPI opens a filtered detail view.
AdminDashboard.setupIncompleteHint: Finish setup, then use the dashboard editor to tailor the admin view for the people running the program.
AdminDashboard.errorUnauthorized: That action is only available to admin users.
AdminDashboard.setupComplete: Setup completed. This workspace is ready for onboarding.

StaffDashboard.description: Review today's workload, open the next filtered view, and tailor the layout around your daily decisions.
StaffDashboard.hint: {orgName} uses role defaults plus personal overrides. Every chart and list widget supports drill-through or tooltip interaction.
StaffDashboard.errorUnauthorized: That action is only available to a different role.

ClientDashboard.description: Review your current status, upcoming appointments, and recent activity in one portal.
ClientDashboard.hint: This dashboard only uses client-safe data. Internal case notes remain hidden.

ServicesPage.pageDescription: Record your session summary out loud — AI transcribes and structures it into a case note for review before saving.
ServicesPage.cardDescription: Select a client, tap Start Recording, speak your summary, then review and save the AI-structured entry.

ClientsPage.pageDescription: Search by name, review recent records, and open each client profile.
ClientsPage.cardDescription: Default sorting is newest first so recently created clients stay easy to find.
ClientsPage.emptySearchDescription: Try a broader name search or clear the filter.
ClientsPage.emptyTitle: No clients have been added yet.
ClientsPage.emptyDescription: Create the first client record to get the directory started.

NewClientPage.pageDescription: Create a client record with core contact and demographic details.

ClientProfilePage.pageDescription: Demographics, custom fields, and service history stay together so staff can work from one page.
ClientProfilePage.successCreated: Client created successfully. The generated public client ID is {clientId}.
ClientProfilePage.errorStatus: We could not update the client status. Try again.
ClientProfilePage.cardProfileDescription: Core demographics and contact information for staff.
ClientProfilePage.customFieldsEmptyMessage: No admin-defined client fields have been filled in yet.
ClientProfilePage.serviceHistoryDescription: Reverse chronological history of services, visits, and follow-up notes.
ClientProfilePage.emptyHistoryDescription: Use the service entry form above to add the client's first visit.

SchedulePage.pageDescription: Track upcoming appointments, reminder status, and the next week of visits.
SchedulePage.errorDelete: We could not delete that appointment. Try again.
SchedulePage.todayCardDescription: Same-day appointments stay visible first so staff can prep quickly.
SchedulePage.thisWeekCardDescription: Lightweight day-grouped layout for the next seven days. No drag-and-drop, just reliable visibility.

AdminPage.pageDescription: Manage approved access, imports, field configuration, and change history from one page.
AdminPage.errorCustomFields: We could not update that field definition. Try again.
AdminPage.errorAllowlist: We could not update that approved access entry. Try again.
AdminPage.workspaceProfileDescription: Review branding, setup status, and admin operations for this deployment.
AdminPage.approvedAccessDescription: Access is controlled by email allowlist. Google is preferred, and password fallback works only for approved emails.
AdminPage.clientPortalLinksDescription: These records are currently bound to a signed-in client profile. The allowlist entry is still the source of truth for future access.
AdminPage.emptyClientPortalLinks: No client portal accounts are linked yet.
AdminPage.configuredFieldsDescription: Toggle fields on or off without changing the underlying record workflow.
AdminPage.auditLogDescription: Change history is stored for clients, service entries, appointments, and field definitions. Sensitive note bodies stay out of the log.
AdminPage.emptyAuditLog: No audit events matched the current filters.

ImportAssistantPage.pageDescription: Download the standard templates, then use premium admin AI for mapping suggestions only when this workspace enables it.
ImportAssistantPage.errorAdminAiDisabled: Premium admin AI is not enabled for this workspace.
ImportAssistantPage.errorAssistantUnavailable: Premium admin AI is unavailable right now. Use the included templates and manual import workflow.
ImportAssistantPage.errorMissingFile: Choose a CSV file before starting the import assistant.
ImportAssistantPage.errorSaveFailed: The import session could not be saved.
ImportAssistantPage.errorSession: That import session could not be loaded.
ImportAssistantPage.errorNoRows: No normalized rows were available to import.
ImportAssistantPage.analyzeCardDescriptionAi: The model suggests the target entity and field mapping. The app validates and previews the rows before import.
ImportAssistantPage.analyzeCardDescriptionBase: Base plan guidance includes templates and manual preparation. AI-assisted mapping is optional premium admin AI.
ImportAssistantPage.aiDisabledHint: AI-assisted CSV mapping is optional. Use the sample files on this page as the standard format for manual preparation, then return when premium admin AI is enabled.
ImportAssistantPage.recentSessionsDescription: Reopen a recent mapping session or review the current one below.
ImportAssistantPage.headerMappingDescription: AI suggested this mapping. The app applies it deterministically after review.
ImportAssistantPage.previewRowsDescription: First 10 normalized rows that will be imported.

SetupPage.cardDescription: Finish branding, support details, access review, and starter-data planning so this deployment feels ready for a real nonprofit team instead of a half-configured workspace.
SetupPage.errorStep: We could not update that setup step. Try again.

CustomizeDashboardPage.pageDescription: Build a governed layout with configurable widgets, drill-through charts, and optional AI add-ons.
CustomizeDashboardPage.successReset: Personal layout reset to the role default.
CustomizeDashboardPage.errorAdminAiDisabled: Premium admin AI is not enabled for this workspace.
CustomizeDashboardPage.errorRecommendationFields: Complete every workflow field before requesting a recommendation.
CustomizeDashboardPage.errorRecommendationUnavailable: Premium admin AI is unavailable right now. Use the manual workflow for now.
CustomizeDashboardPage.errorGeneric: Dashboard action failed. Review the inputs and try again.
CustomizeDashboardPage.layoutDescRole: Changes here affect the default layout for this role.
CustomizeDashboardPage.layoutDescPersonalOverride: This view overrides the role default for your account.
CustomizeDashboardPage.layoutDescPersonalDefault: You are currently using the role default layout.
CustomizeDashboardPage.savedDefaultSummary: The current saved default contains {count} widgets for the {role} role.
CustomizeDashboardPage.addWidgetsDescription: Add a governed widget from the approved catalog.
CustomizeDashboardPage.customChartDescription: Choose a supported dataset, metric, dimension, and timeframe.
CustomizeDashboardPage.aiSuggestionsDescriptionEnabled: Describe the role and daily work. CaseFlow will recommend widgets and explain why they matter.
CustomizeDashboardPage.aiSuggestionsDescriptionDisabled: Manual widget selection is included in base. AI suggestions are optional and available as premium admin AI.
CustomizeDashboardPage.dayToDayPlaceholder: Review caseload, manage staff workload, track open referrals...
CustomizeDashboardPage.decisionsPlaceholder: Where to allocate staff, which clients need follow-up, which program is over capacity...
CustomizeDashboardPage.painPointsPlaceholder: Too many tabs, slow follow-up visibility
CustomizeDashboardPage.aiDisabledHint: Premium admin AI can suggest widget bundles from the approved catalog. The base plan still includes role defaults, personal overrides, and manual widget editing.

ExplorePage.errorClientPortalUnavailable: That detail view is not available in the client portal.
ExplorePage.errorAdminOnly: That detail view is only available to admins.

ResetPasswordPage.pageDescription: Use this page if you rely on the password fallback instead of Google sign-in and want to change your password.
ResetPasswordPage.infoNote: After you update the password, CaseFlow will send you back to the right dashboard for your role automatically.
